mapper.select: SELECT id, article_name, article_status, `like`, created_at FROM o_blog.o_article WHERE article_status = 3 AND o_article.article_writer like 'oldmerman' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT oa.id, oa.article_name, oa.article_decr, oag.group_name, oa.article_type FROM o_blog.o_article oa LEFT JOIN o_blog.o_article_group_link oagl ON oa.id = oagl.article_id LEFT JOIN o_blog.o_article_group oag ON oagl.group_id = oag.id WHERE oa.article_status = 3 AND oa.article_type = #{articleType} ORDER BY oa.id LIMIT #{offset}, #{size};
